page.title: EPR reports & declarations
page.subtitle: Generate the bundles ready to upload to the EPR portals (LUCID for Germany, CONAI for Italy, CITEO for France). Each report contains every file the authority asks for.

sections.new_reports_empty: No new reports to download. We generate a fresh report automatically at the end of each configured period.

tooltips.trial_locked: End your free trial or move to a paid plan to download reports.
tooltips.draft: This report is still a draft and isn't available to download yet.

empty_state.past_body: Reports you've already downloaded will appear here for future reference.

form.growth_help: E.g. 10 = +10% over last year's quantities. Leave empty to keep them unchanged.
form.manual_quantities_required: Enter at least one quantity to generate the forecast.
form.forecast_note: The forecast (Planmengenmeldung) estimates quantities for the selected period. Without manual quantities, the prior closed year is used as the basis.
form.footer_note: We generate reports automatically at the cadence set for each country. Use this form only for backfills, tests or custom periods.

addon_modal.title: Country not in your plan
addon_modal.body: This report needs access to {{country}}, which isn't in your current plan. Add it as an extra country for {{currency}}{{amount}} per year.

toasts.download_failed: The report download didn't go through.
toasts.trial_blocked: End your free trial or move to a paid plan to download reports.
toasts.expired_blocked: Your subscription has expired. Renew it to keep downloading reports.
toasts.shopify_billing_issue: Shopify hit a hiccup, please try again in a moment.
toasts.addon_failed: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

upload_guides.title: How to upload the report to {{authority}}

DE.intro: The German report contains the Mengenmeldung data required by the LUCID portal under VerpackG.
steps: Log into the LUCID portal with your company credentials.
Go to "Datenmeldung" → "Mengenmeldung" for the relevant period.
Upload the file {{file}} from the ZIP, or copy the values into the online form row by row.
Confirm and submit the declaration. Keep the receipt for your records.
DE.tip: Tip: upload the report as a draft (Entwurf) first to double-check the totals before the final submission.

IT.intro: The Italian report contains the 6.1/6.2 declaration data and supporting forms for CONAI's Contributo Ambientale.
steps: Log into the CONAI reserved area with your Consorzio credentials.
Open "Dichiarazioni online" → the form for the relevant period.
Import the file {{file}} or copy the totals from the "Riepilogo" sheet.
Attach the summary to your accounting documents and submit.
IT.tip: Tip: cross-check the report's "total kg per material" against your DDTs before confirming the submission.

FR.intro: The French report follows the CITEO annual declaration format for the eco-contribution on emballages ménagers.
steps: Log into the CITEO portal using your adhérent number.
Import the file {{file}} or copy the totals into the form fields.
Check totals per material, validate and submit the declaration.
FR.tip: Tip: keep your SIRET number at hand — you'll need it to attach the declaration.
